FTC Takes Action against Second VoIP Ser: The Federal Trade Commission (FTC) took action against Alcazar Networks Inc. and its owner Gavin Grabias for facilitating tens of millions of illegal telemarketing robocalls, including calls to numbers on the Do Not Call Registry and with spoofed caller IDs.
